abilities.name: Mark the Target
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Free Action, designate one enemy Digimon as Marked. While Marked, that enemy takes -2 to all attack rolls. Only one enemy can be Marked at a time. Switching the Mark costs your Free Action.

abilities.name: Predator's Patience
abilities.description: Once per encounter if your partner Digimon does not attack on their turn, they gain +4 to their next attack roll on their following turn.

abilities.name: Tear Apart
abilities.description: When your partner Digimon hits a Marked enemy, that enemy loses 1 point of damage resistance until the end of the encounter. This stacks — each hit reduces their resistance by 1 more.

abilities.name: Eyes Everywhere
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Knowledge rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Free Action, you may learn the current HP total of any one visible enemy. Additionally your partner Digimon deals +2 damage to any enemy currently below half their maximum HP.

abilities.name: Relentless
abilities.description: Your partner Digimon's attacks against a Marked enemy cannot be interrupted or redirected — abilities that would force your partner to retarget or miss their Marked enemy automatically fail against them.

abilities.name: Isolate
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Basic Action, choose one enemy Digimon. Until the end of the round that enemy cannot be healed, cannot receive buffs, and cannot benefit from any ally's protective abilities.

abilities.name: The Dark Warrior
abilities.description: Once per session at the start of your turn you may declare The Dark Warrior. Mark up to two enemies simultaneously for the rest of this encounter — both are Marked at once, costs and effects apply to both. Additionally while The Dark Warrior is active your partner Digimon deals +3 damage on all attacks against Marked enemies. This lasts until the end of the encounter or until both Marked enemies are defeated.
